e2e61dca6d54.title: Publish opening hours — you're invisible to 'open now' searches
e2e61dca6d54.description: No opening hours listed. Every customer filtering by 'open now' on Google Maps will never see you. This takes 2 minutes to fix.
e2e61dca6d54.management_implication: This is a zero-effort, high-impact fix.

972dbd78dd66.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
972dbd78dd66.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
972dbd78dd66.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

6324d8da4b65.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
6324d8da4b65.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.
